entries.title: Minecraft 26.1 version-change sources
entries.summary: Authoritative version-change evidence should combine NeoForged primers for loader migration notes with misode technical-changes markdown for vanilla data and resource format changes.

entries.title: NeoForged 26.1 primer
searchTerms: Items and Emeralds to Potion Effect Item

metadata.preview:
Minecraft 1.21.11 -> 26.1 Mod Migration Primer

This is a high level, non-exhaustive overview on how to migrate your mod from 1.21.11 to 26.1. This does not look at any specific mod loader, just the changes to the vanilla classes.

This primer is licensed under the [Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/), so feel free to use it as a reference and leave a link so that other readers can consume the primer.

If there's any incorrect or missing information, please file an issue on this repository or ping @ChampionAsh5357 in the Neoforged Discord server.

Thank you to:

- @Shnupbups for some grammatical fixes

- @cassiancc for information about Java 25 IDE support

- @boq for information regarding IME support

- @lolothepro for a typo

Pack Changes

There are a number of user-facing changes that are part of vanilla which are not discussed below that may be relevant to modders. You can find a list of them on [Misode's version changelog](https://misode.github.io/versions/?id=26.1&tab=changelog).

Java 25 and Deobfuscation

26.1 introduces two new changes into the general pipeline.

First, the Java Development Kit has been upgraded from

entries.title: misode 26.1-pre-1 technical changes
entries.summary: pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 101.0.

metadata.preview:
pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 101.0.

pack breaking | Resource pack format has been increased to 84.0.

text | Changed the selector, nbt, and object text component formats.

command | Added time rate command syntax: time [of <clock>] rate <rate>. Sets the rate multiplier at which the given clock advances.

component | Changed provides_banner_patterns data component: the component now also accepts an ID or a list of IDs in addition to a tag.

component | Changed blocks_attacks data component: the bypassed_by field now also accepts an ID or a list of IDs in addition to a tag.

component | Changed damage_resistant data component: the types field now also accepts an ID or a list of IDs in addition to a tag.

loot instrument | Changed set_instrument loot function: the options field now also accepts an ID or a list of IDs in addition to a tag.

predicate environment-attribute | Added environment_attribute_check loot predicate. Exactly matches the value of an Environment Attribute at a given position.

environment-attribute | Added environment_attribute number provider. Fetches and provides the value of an Environment Attribute that can be represented as

entries.title: misode 26.1-pre-2 technical changes
entries.summary: text | Text components in server status messages nested more than 16 times will now be discarded and replaced with an ellipsis.

metadata.preview: text | Text components in server status messages nested more than 16 times will now be discarded and replaced with an ellipsis.

entries.title: misode 26.1-pre-3 technical changes
entries.summary: pack breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 101.1.

metadata.preview:
pack breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 101.1.

worldgen | Changed count placement modifier: the count field is now limited to a range of 0 to 4096, up from 256.

entries.title: misode 26.1-snapshot-1 technical changes
entries.summary: pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 95.0.

metadata.preview:
pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 95.0.

pack obsolete breaking | Resource pack format has been increased to 76.0.

jar | The game now requires Java 25. The included Java distribution is now the Microsoft build of OpenJDK 25.

meta | If a server's disk space is low, a toast will now be shown to server operators.

data | Villager trades can now be data-driven, with entries in the villager_trade folder.

data | Trade sets can now be data-driven, with entries in the trade_set folder.

nbt entity | Piglin inventory slots can now be accessed using piglin.* similar to how villager inventories can be accessed using villager.*.

command | Added swing command that enables swinging of entity arms. Syntax: /swing <entity selector> <mainhand|offhand>.

environment-attribute | Added visual/block_light_tint attribute to control the tint of block light. Default value: #FFD88C.

environment-attribute | Added visual/ambient_light_color attribute to define both the ambient light tint and brightness. Default values: Overworld #0A0A0A, Nether #302821, End #3f473f.

environment-attribute | Added visual/night_vision_color attribute to control night vision color. Default val

entries.title: misode 26.1-snapshot-2 technical changes
entries.summary: pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 96.0.

metadata.preview:
pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 96.0.

pack obsolete breaking | Resource pack format has been increased to 77.0.

data variant | Changed wolf sound variant definitions. The sound_events field in wolf_sound_variant has been renamed to adult_sounds, and a new baby_sounds field was added.

nbt entity | The current_explosion_impact_pos and current_impulse_context_reset_grace_time fields have been moved from players to all mobs and armor stands.

nbt entity breaking | Removed the ignore_fall_damage_from_current_explosion field from players.

tag | Added #metal_nuggets item tag, which includes copper, iron, and gold nuggets.

assets | Added new entity textures for baby animals, including variants.

assets breaking | Renamed entity textures to standardize naming conventions.

assets breaking | Moved entity textures into subdirectories for better organization.

sound | Added new sound events for baby cats: entity.baby_cat.ambient, entity.baby_cat.hiss, entity.baby_cat.hurt, entity.baby_cat.death, entity.baby_cat.eat, entity.baby_cat.beg_for_food, entity.baby_cat.purr, entity.baby_cat.purreow, and entity.baby_cat.stray_ambient.

sound | Added new sound events

entries.title: misode 26.1-snapshot-3 technical changes
entries.summary: pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 97.0.

metadata.preview:
pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 97.0.

pack obsolete breaking | Resource pack format has been increased to 78.0.

data | Added world_clock registry for defining World Clocks in data packs under data/<namespace>/world_clock/<id>.json. World Clocks contain an internal time that increases every tick and can be paused or resumed.

data | Added clock field to timelines. This field is required and specifies which World Clock ID the timeline is tied to. To match previous behavior, the overworld clock can be used.

data | Added optional time_markers field to timelines. This field is an optional map between namespaced Time Marker IDs and either an int or a Time Marker object with fields ticks and optional show_in_commands.

data | Time Markers assign a particular name to a specific (optionally repeating) point in time for a specific World Clock. Time Markers replace the previously predetermined names that could be used by /time set, such as day or night.

data | Added wake_up_from_sleep Time Marker, which is the time to advance the dimension's default clock to when players in that dimension wake up after sleeping.

data | Added roll_village_siege Time Marker,

entries.title: misode 26.1-snapshot-4 technical changes
entries.summary: pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 97.1.

metadata.preview:
pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 97.1.

pack obsolete breaking | Resource pack format has been increased to 78.1.

nbt entity breaking | Villager and piglin inventory slots can now only be accessed using mob.inventory.*. The villager.* and piglin.* accessors have been removed.

worldgen dimension | Added minecraft:the_end world clock to the End dimension, which controls the sky flashes.

tag | Added block tags #supports_stem_fruit, #supports_pumpkin_stem_fruit, and #supports_melon_stem_fruit, which determine which blocks a category of vegetation can be placed on and survive.

assets | Added new entity textures for baby horses and variants.

sound | Added new sound events for baby horses.

entries.title: misode 26.1-snapshot-5 technical changes
entries.summary: pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 98.0.

metadata.preview:
pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 98.0.

pack obsolete breaking | Resource pack format has been increased to 79.0.

text | Tags resolved from minecraft:nbt text components with interpret: false are now pretty-printed instead of being flattened into a single text component.

recipe | The result field now accepts short form across all recipe types (e.g. "minecraft:foo" is equivalent to {"id":"minecraft:foo", "count": 1}).

environment-attribute | Updated the gameplay/turtle_egg_hatch_chance environment attribute to have a default value of 0.002.

component | Added minecraft:dye data component, which represents a color of dye. Used in various places that previously required the exact dye item, including mob and block interactions.

loot | Changed minecraft:set_random_dyes loot function. It no longer works only for items in the #dyeable tag.

recipe breaking | The minecraft:crafting_special_mapcloning recipe type has been removed. Functionality has been absorbed by minecraft:crafting_transmute.

recipe | Added show_notification field to some recipe types. This optional boolean describes if a popup should be shown when the recipe is unlocked, and defaults t

entries.title: misode 26.1-snapshot-6 technical changes
entries.summary: pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 99.0.

metadata.preview:
pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 99.0.

pack obsolete breaking | Resource pack format has been increased to 80.0.

storage dimension breaking | All default dimensions are now stored in the dimensions subfolder. The top level data folder is now only for data shared across dimensions.

storage breaking | Player storage has been moved to the players subdirectory.

storage breaking | The world resource pack (resources.zip) has been moved to the resourcepacks subdirectory.

storage breaking | Data saved in the data folder is now namespaced. All data is now stored in a namespace subfolder in the corresponding data folder.

storage breaking | Command storage is now stored in namespace subfolders instead of having a namespace suffix.

storage breaking | chunks.dat has been renamed to chunk_tickets.dat.

storage breaking | Data for maps is now stored in the data/minecraft/maps subfolder. Map index files have been renamed to only the number. idcounts.dat has been renamed to last_id.dat.

storage breaking | There is no more raids_end.dat special case. The end now uses raids.dat as well.

storage structure breaking | Structures saved by structure blocks have been

entries.title: misode 26.1-snapshot-7 technical changes
entries.summary: pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 99.1.

metadata.preview:
pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 99.1.

pack obsolete breaking | Resource pack format has been increased to 81.0.

jar | The internals of how chunk geometry data is stored in GPU memory and how they are rendered has been changed.

data variant | Cat sound variants can now be data-driven, with entries in the cat_sound_variant folder.

data variant | Pig sound variants can now be data-driven, with entries in the pig_sound_variant folder.

data variant | Cow sound variants can now be data-driven, with entries in the cow_sound_variant folder.

data variant | Chicken sound variants can now be data-driven, with entries in the chicken_sound_variant folder.

assets | Updated mule_baby.png and donkey_baby.png to fit model properly.

assets breaking | Changed block model format. Any block model can now support cutout or translucent (partially transparent pixels) textures.

assets breaking | Changed the format of the textures map in block models. Non-string entries will now be rejected, instead of interpreted as strings.

assets | Added new baby entity textures.

sound | Added new sound variants for adult cats, adult chickens, adult cows, and adult pigs.

sound

entries.title: misode 26.1-snapshot-8 technical changes
entries.summary: pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 99.2.

metadata.preview:
pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 99.2.

pack obsolete breaking | Resource pack format has been increased to 81.1.

command | Added new entity subcommand to /fetchprofile that prints profile information from an entity in the world.

text breaking | The selector field in minecraft:selector text components no longer accepts trailing data after a selector.

text | Tags resolved with the minecraft:nbt text component when the interpret field is set to false are now pretty-printed instead of being flattened into a single text component.

text breaking | Contents of the nbt and block fields in minecraft:nbt text components are no longer silently rejected when parsing fails.

text breaking | The entity field in minecraft:nbt text components no longer accepts trailing data after a selector.

text | Added plain option to minecraft:nbt text components to remove styling from pretty-printed text. The plain and interpret options can't both be enabled at the same time.

assets | Added new UI sprite gui/sprites/widget/preedit.png for IME preedit overlay background.

assets | Added new entity textures for baby hoglins, zoglins, striders, sniffers and pandas.

entries.title: misode 26.1-snapshot-10 technical changes
entries.summary: pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 99.3.

metadata.preview:
pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 99.3.

pack obsolete breaking | Resource pack format has been increased to 82.0.

particle | Added pause_mob_growth particle, which displays on a baby mob with aging stopped by a golden dandelion.

particle | Added reset_mob_growth particle, which displays on a baby mob with aging reset by a golden dandelion.

assets | Updated textures for baby zombies, baby husks, and gurgles to use smaller heads.

entries.title: misode 26.1-snapshot-11 technical changes
entries.summary: pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 100.0.

metadata.preview:
pack obsolete breaking | Data pack format has been increased to 100.0.

pack obsolete breaking | Resource pack format has been increased to 83.0.

variant sound | Pig variant sound sets now support eating sound customization via the new eat_sound field.

game-test | Added timeline_attributes definitions to game test environments. The timelines field accepts a list of timelines to set.

blockstate | The rotation property in the default block state of banners and signs has been changed from 0 to 8.

loot | Removed name tag from the ancient city and woodland mansion loot tables.

worldgen | Added rule_based_state_provider as a new block state provider type. It was previously a separately parsed type unique to the disk feature but is now a sub-type usable in any feature configuration.

tag | Added block tag #prevents_nearby_leaf_decay, which defines block types that prevent leaf blocks from decaying within a taxicab distance of 6 blocks.

assets | Item model format now supports transformation for individual sub-models.

sound | Added new eating sound events for all pig variants.

assets breaking | The transformation for some special item model types has been moved from the special mode
